title: Layer 1: Intent propagation, user-centric DOD, review fix cycles, and pipeline reorder
description: Update pipeline docs to implement first-pass quality improvements: pipeline reorder, directive-level DOD, clarification step, user-centric acceptance scenarios, builder context enrichment, review fix cycles, and phase definitions.

in: Reorder pipeline steps (merge challenge into brainstorm, move audit before brainstorm, add clarification step)
Add directive-level dod to directive-json schema
Add clarification step with intent extraction and CEO verification
Rewrite scope-and-dod.md with user-centric acceptance scenarios
Update project-brainstorm with CEO brief + intent inputs
Update execute-projects: builder prompt includes CEO brief, 3 code-review fix cycles, 2 standard review fix cycles
Remove single-project bias from planner prompt

dod.criterion: Pipeline step order in SKILL.md is: triage, checkpoint, read, context, audit, brainstorm, clarification, plan, approve, project-brainstorm, setup, execute, review-gate, wrapup, completion
directive-json.md contains directive-level dod schema with success_looks_like, failure_looks_like, quality_bar, examples
Clarification step doc exists and is wired into SKILL.md routing table
scope-and-dod.md DOD examples are user-centric acceptance scenarios, not technical checkboxes
Builder prompt in 09-execute-projects.md includes CEO brief + verified intent as required inputs
Code-review fix cycles increased to 3 with convergence detection; standard review fix cycles = 2
planner-prompt.md no longer contains single-project-is-default bias

tasks.title: Reorder pipeline steps: move audit before brainstorm, merge challenge into brainstorm
tasks.user_scenario: When a directive runs, audit fires before brainstorm so brainstorm is grounded in codebase reality, and challenge is handled inside brainstorm rather than as a separate step.
tasks.scope: Update SKILL.md routing table to new order. Remove challenge row. Update step numbers and current_step enum in directive-json.md. Merge challenge into brainstorm-prompt.md. Delete 04-challenge.md references. Update audit and planning docs for new input dependencies.

dod.criterion: SKILL.md routing table lists 14 steps in new order with no 'challenge' row and has 'clarification' step
directive-json.md current_step enum matches new step IDs (no 'challenge', has 'clarification')
06-technical-audit.md depends on 'context' step (not 'plan')
05-planning.md references both audit findings AND brainstorm synthesis as inputs
brainstorm-prompt.md Phase 1 includes challenge instruction block for heavyweight/strategic

tasks.title: Add directive-level DOD schema with success/failure/quality fields
tasks.user_scenario: When a directive is created, it includes structured DOD fields that define what good looks like and these propagate to project and task DOD downstream.
tasks.scope: Add top-level 'dod' object to directive-json.md with success_looks_like, failure_looks_like, quality_bar, examples. Update directive.json example. Update read step doc to extract DOD from CEO brief.

dod.criterion: directive-json.md schema includes 'dod' object with success_looks_like (string[]), failure_looks_like (string[]), quality_bar (string), examples (array)
directive-json.md example JSON block includes populated dod section
Read step doc instructs orchestrator to extract/derive DOD from CEO brief into directive.json.dod
No existing schema fields are broken — dod object is additive

tasks.title: Create clarification step doc and wire into pipeline
tasks.user_scenario: After brainstorm, the pipeline extracts intent from CEO brief + audit + brainstorm and presents it to CEO for piece-by-piece verification before planning begins.
tasks.scope: Create new clarification step doc. Intent extraction from directive.md + audit + brainstorm into structured intent block. CEO verification gate for heavyweight/strategic, auto-approve for lightweight/medium. Store in directive.json. Wire into SKILL.md.

dod.criterion: Clarification step doc exists in docs/pipeline/ with intent extraction, CEO verification, and storage instructions
SKILL.md routing table row for 'clarification' points to new doc with correct step number
Doc specifies inputs (directive.md, audit output, brainstorm output) and output (verified_intent in pipeline.clarification.output)
Heavyweight/strategic: CEO verification gate. Lightweight/medium: auto-approve with logged intent

tasks.title: Rewrite scope-and-dod.md with user-centric acceptance scenarios
tasks.user_scenario: When the CTO decomposes projects, DOD examples guide them toward acceptance scenarios describing user-observable outcomes instead of technical checkboxes.
tasks.scope: Rewrite scope-and-dod.md: shift DOD from technical checkboxes to user-centric acceptance scenarios. Add given/when/then examples. Replace technical 'good DOD' examples. Add derivation chain: directive DOD → project DOD → task DOD.

dod.criterion: scope-and-dod.md contains at least 2 full workflow acceptance scenario examples in given/when/then format
Good DOD examples are user-centric scenarios — no example says 'type-check passes' or 'Zod schema exists'
Derivation chain section shows directive.dod.success_looks_like → project DOD → task definition_of_done
UI/Visual DOD rules preserved and integrated with scenario approach

tasks.title: Update project-brainstorm to include CEO brief + intent and derive acceptance scenarios
tasks.user_scenario: When the CTO decomposes a project, they receive CEO's original brief and verified intent, ensuring task DOD traces back to what the CEO actually wanted.
tasks.scope: Update 07b-project-brainstorm.md: add CEO brief and verified intent to Inputs. Add instruction to derive task DOD from directive-level DOD. Update output schema example with scenario-style DOD.

dod.criterion: 07b-project-brainstorm.md Inputs section lists CEO brief (directive.md) and verified intent alongside existing inputs
Brainstorm prompt includes instruction to derive task DOD from directive.json.dod.success_looks_like
Output JSON example shows task with scenario-style definition_of_done items
Prompt states task DOD across all tasks should collectively cover directive's success_looks_like

tasks.title: Update execute-projects: CEO brief in builder prompt, enhanced fix cycles
tasks.user_scenario: Builders see CEO's original brief and intent verbatim. Code-review gets 3 fix cycles with convergence detection. Standard review gets 2 fix cycles.
tasks.scope: Update 09-execute-projects.md: add CEO brief + intent to builder spawn context. Change code-review max from 1 to 3 with convergence detection. Add standard review fix cycles (max 2). Update phase-definitions.md with review-fix loop.

dod.criterion: Builder Context section lists CEO brief and verified intent as required spawn inputs with verbatim instruction
Code-Review section specifies max 3 fix cycles with convergence detection (same bugs recurring = escalate)
New Standard Review Fix Cycles section: fail → re-spawn builder → re-review → max 2 cycles
phase-definitions.md documents review-fix loop under both code-review and review phases

tasks.title: Remove single-project bias, add audit weight_recommendation
tasks.user_scenario: COO no longer defaults to one project. Audit can upgrade directive weight when it reveals higher complexity.
tasks.scope: Update planner-prompt.md: remove SINGLE-PROJECT IS THE DEFAULT. Update 06-technical-audit.md: add weight_recommendation. Update pipeline logic to check and upgrade weight after audit.

dod.criterion: planner-prompt.md no longer contains 'SINGLE-PROJECT IS THE DEFAULT' or equivalent bias
06-technical-audit.md architect output includes weight_recommendation field
Pipeline logic upgrades directive.json.weight if weight_recommendation suggests higher
audit-output.md schema includes weight_recommendation field

tasks.title: Create failure-patterns.md and cross-file consistency pass
tasks.user_scenario: A failure-patterns.md exists with recurring patterns, and all cross-references between modified pipeline docs are consistent.
tasks.scope: Create .context/lessons/failure-patterns.md with 3 pre-populated patterns. Consistency pass: verify step IDs, input/output references, no orphan references to deleted files.

dod.criterion: failure-patterns.md exists with 3+ pre-populated patterns each having pattern/symptom/root-cause/mitigation
No file references 04-challenge.md, challenger-output.md, or challenger-prompt.md
Step IDs in SKILL.md, directive-json.md, and pipeline doc headers are all consistent
Every pipeline doc input reference points to correct step in new order
